#  Edit a User in Your Free Procore Account (Android) 
##### Limited Release
The Team tool is currently only available to users in the United States who have a free Procore account via the [Procore Construction Network](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-the-procore-construction-network).
##  Things to Consider 
  * To have a free Procore account, become a part of the [Procore Construction Network ](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-the-procore-construction-network)(PCN).
  * To add a user in the Team tool, their email domain must match your company's email domain.
  * **Required User Permissions** :
    * 'System Administrator' permissions for the Procore Construction Network account.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the **Team** tool using the Procore app on an Android mobile device.  
_Note:_ Find the 'Team' tool on any of your app's main pages: Sidebar screen, Home screen, or Project Overview screen.
  2. Click the name of the user that you want to edit information for.
  3. Click the **edit** ![Icon Edit2](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/60cfc64d76d10b52cd7d785b4bfdc9e5/794e5b31acad2246f1d1f6fb29a3d532/icon-edit2.png?fm=webp&h=15) icon.
  4. Edit the information or permissions as necessary.
  5. Click **Save**.


## See Also
  * [Assign a User as a Bid Contact in Your Free Procore Account (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/team-android/tutorials/assign-a-user-as-a-bid-contact-in-your-free-procore-account-android)
  * [View Users in Your Free Procore Account (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/team-android/tutorials/view-users-in-your-free-procore-account-android)
  * [Deactivate or Reactivate a User in Your Free Procore Account (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/team-android/tutorials/deactivate-or-reactivate-a-user-in-your-free-procore-account-android)
title: Edit a User in Your Free Procore Account (Android)
description: How to edit information or permissions for a Team user in the Procore app on an Android mobile device.
